parameters.name: User-Agent
parameters.value: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 Chrome/120 Safari/537.36

parameters.text:
=You are an expert business analyst. Analyze the following web page content and return a structured classification.

URL: {{ $('Validate & Extract Inputs').item.json.product_url }}

PAGE CONTENT:
{{$json["content"]}}

Analyze this page and determine:

1. PAGE TYPE - one of: product_page, brand_homepage, category_page, pricing_page, landing_page, blog_post, about_page
2. INDUSTRY - the specific industry (e.g. consumer electronics, SaaS, fashion, food & beverage, healthcare, B2B software, fitness, home goods, etc.)
3. BUSINESS MODEL - one of: B2C, B2B, B2B2C, marketplace, subscription, D2C, enterprise
4. BUYING JOURNEY STAGE - one of: awareness, consideration, decision
5. BRAND NAME - the company or brand name
6. PRODUCT NAME - specific product name if this is a product page, otherwise null
7. PRICE TIER - one of: budget, mid-range, premium, luxury, enterprise, freemium
8. TARGET CUSTOMER - who this is for in one sentence
9. TOP USPs - array of 3-5 unique selling points found on the page
10. KEY THEMES - array of 4-6 main topics this page covers

CRITICAL: Return ONLY valid JSON. No explanation. No markdown. No code fences.

OUTPUT FORMAT:
{
  "page_type": "string",
  "industry": "string",
  "business_model": "string",
  "buying_journey_stage": "string",
  "brand_name": "string",
  "product_name": "string or null",
  "price_tier": "string",
  "target_customer": "string",
  "top_usps": ["string"],
  "key_themes": ["string"]
}
